header.title: Deleted Instances
header.description: Manage WhatsApp instances that were deleted (soft delete)

empty.title: No deleted instances
empty.description: All your WhatsApp instances are active

info.title: About deleted instances
info.bulletSoftDelete: Deleted instances are hidden but can be restored
info.bulletConversations: All conversations are preserved and remain accessible
info.bulletRestoredState: When restored, the instance returns as "disconnected"
info.bulletReconnect: You will need to reconnect the instance after restoring
